title: Virgo November 2026 Horoscope and Crystal of the Month

rank_math_title: Virgo November 2026 Horoscope: Key Dates, Love, Career & Crystal of the Month
rank_math_description: Virgo November 2026 monthly horoscope — key dates, love, career, health and Crystal of the Month (Obsidian). New Moon Nov 8 in Scorpio (communication, writing); Gemini Beaver Full Moon Nov 24 (career, public role); Mars conjunct Jupiter Nov 16 in Leo (rest, behind-the-scenes).
content:
Virgo November 2026 Horoscope and Crystal of the Month

Energy ThemeRefine the message, claim the role
Key DatesVenus + Mercury (your ruler) station direct Nov 13 / New Moon Nov 8 (Scorpio, 3rd house) / Mars conjunct Jupiter Nov 16 (Leo, your 12th) / Gemini Beaver Full Moon Nov 24 (10th house)
Love3rd house Scorpio New Moon reopens communication in love; the 10th house Full Moon shifts the work-life balance
Career10th house Beaver Full Moon is one of 2026's biggest public-role moments — a long-building title, role, or recognition matures
Crystal of the MonthObsidian
Lucky ColorsDeep black, glossy onyx, forest green
Lucky Number10
AffirmationI refine the message; I let the role be seen as it has been built.

This Month's Energy

Virgo, November 2026 refines the message and claims the role. Venus and Mercury (your ruler) both station direct on November 13, releasing October's retrograde season with extra weight for you. The New Moon in Scorpio on November 8 falls in your 3rd house of communication, writing, siblings, and neighborhood — a fresh start in your message. Then November 16 brings Mars conjunct Jupiter at 25°53' Leo, your 12th house of rest, closure, and the unconscious — a push toward behind-the-scenes work. November 24 brings the Beaver Full Moon in Gemini, your 10th house of career, public role, and reputation — one of the year's loudest visibility moments. November's pattern: refine the message early, claim the role late.

Key Dates for Virgo in November 2026

DateTransitMeaning for VirgoDo / Avoid
Nov 8New Moon in Scorpio3rd house — fresh start in communication, writing, siblings, neighborhood, contracts; commit to the messageDo: publish the piece, mend the sibling tie, refine the bio, send the pitch
Avoid: hiding the message under false modesty
Nov 13Venus + Mercury station directStation day — your ruler turns direct; the retrograde review season ends. Clarity returns to communication, work, and writingDo: send the message that was waiting, sign the agreement, ship the draft
Avoid: rushing decisions in the 3 days around the station
Nov 16Mars conjunct Jupiter at 25°53' Leo12th house — rest, closure, the unconscious amplify; a push toward behind-the-scenes work, completion, or researchDo: rest, journal, complete what's been waiting, attend to the research
Avoid: forcing public action when the depths ask for quiet work
Nov 24Beaver Full Moon in Gemini10th house — climax around career, public role, reputation; a long-building title, role, or recognition reaches a turning pointDo: claim the title, accept the role, show up visible
Avoid: hiding from recognition that's been building for months
Nov 22Sun enters Sagittarius4th house season — home, family, inner foundation through late DecemberDo: rest the roots, organize the home, mend the family tie
Avoid: spreading across too many public commitments
Early NovMars moves through Leo (your 12th)Rest, closure, the unconscious stay active; the run-up to Nov 16 builds the behind-the-scenes momentumDo: complete the unfinished, tend to the research, attend to dreams
Avoid: ignoring the body's call for rest

Career & Money

For Virgo, November's career story culminates at the 10th house Beaver Full Moon. The Gemini Full Moon on November 24 falls in your 10th house of career and public role — one of 2026's clearest "be seen" moments. A long-building title, role, or recognition matures.

The Scorpio New Moon on November 8 (your 3rd house) handles the upstream: your message, platform, writing, contracts. Mercury (your ruler) stationing direct on November 13 releases the writing and communication blocks. Mars conjunct Jupiter in your 12th house on November 16 favors research and behind-the-scenes completion. Crystals for wealth can support the visibility; the practical move is refine the message early, claim the role late.

Love & Relationships

The Scorpio New Moon on November 8 in your 3rd house of communication is the love signature of the month for Virgo: words carry the relationship. After October's Venus retrograde review, this New Moon is the green light for mending the message.

Mercury (your ruler) stationing direct on November 13 releases the words that were waiting. The Sun entering Sagittarius (your 4th house of home) on November 22 opens the home-rooted season. The Gemini Full Moon on November 24 (your 10th house) may shift the work-life balance. Crystals for love can support the message; the deeper practice is saying the one true sentence, then letting the role meet the relationship.

Health & Wellness

November's wellness story emphasizes the gut, nervous system, and the inner critic. The Scorpio New Moon on November 8 (your 3rd house) can amplify messages and notifications — protect your inputs. Mars conjunct Jupiter in your 12th house on November 16 asks for rest and dream work.

Obsidian, your crystal of the month, is traditionally associated with grounding, protection, the release of old mental patterns, and truth-telling — a useful symbolic companion for a Mercury-ruled earth sign emerging from a retrograde season. Virgo often carries tension in the gut, shoulders, and nervous system; gentle digestion-supporting food, screen-free mornings, and slow walks are especially helpful. This is lifestyle guidance, not medical advice; persistent concerns belong with a clinician.

Crystal of the Month: Obsidian

Why Obsidian fits Virgo this month. You are Mercury-ruled — your reflex is analysis, refinement, the critic. November asks you to refine the message while a public-role climax builds, with rest as the foundation. Obsidian — volcanic glass, deep black — is traditionally tied to truth-telling, the release of old patterns, and grounded clarity. Where Amazonite would soothe and Clear Quartz would amplify, Obsidian cuts through to the truth. Perfect for the 3rd house Scorpio New Moon (refine the message) and the 10th house Gemini Full Moon (claim the role).

How to use it during November 2026. Place Obsidian on your writing desk or workspace on November 8 (the Scorpio New Moon). Hold it during any public-facing moment in the days around November 24.

Best date to use it: November 24, the Gemini Beaver Full Moon in your 10th house — hold Obsidian at your root for 5 minutes before any public moment, naming the truth you'll lead with.

Read more: Obsidian Meaning and Best Crystals for Virgo.

Monthly Crystal Ritual for Virgo — November 2026

When: November 24, the Gemini Beaver Full Moon in your 10th house.
Crystal: Obsidian.
Intention: Refine the message; let the role be seen.

  1. Cleanse Obsidian under cool running water for 30 seconds on the morning of November 8 (the Scorpio New Moon). Let it sit on your writing desk through November 8.
  2. Set the intention between the New Moon and the Full Moon (November 8–24): write down three messages you're refining — and the role you're ready to claim at the Full Moon.
  3. Act at the Beaver Full Moon on November 24: claim the title, accept the role, ship the message. Obsidian in your pocket during the act.
  4. Reflect at the Virgo Full Moon in March 2027 (your 1st house): how has the role matured through the winter? Hold Obsidian during the review.

Shop Virgo Crystals for November 2026

Want to build your monthly crystal toolkit? Explore the full Virgo crystal guide for stones connected with clarity, truth, communication, and grounded visibility — including the Obsidian that cuts through to truth after a retrograde season. Every stone is genuine, ethically sourced, and real — not dyed, not glass.

Frequently Asked Questions — Virgo November 2026

Is November 2026 a good month for Virgo?

It's a refine-and-claim month. The Scorpio New Moon on November 8 (your 3rd house) refines your message. Venus and Mercury (your ruler) station direct on November 13. The Gemini Beaver Full Moon on November 24 (your 10th house) is one of 2026's biggest public-role moments.

How will the Mercury stationing direct on November 13 affect Virgo?

Mercury is your ruling planet — its station direct, alongside Venus, releases October's retrograde season with extra weight. Communication, writing, and work matters that have been under review can finally move forward.

What does the Gemini Beaver Full Moon on November 24 mean for Virgo?

It falls in your 10th house of career and public role — a climax around a long-building title, role, or recognition. Claim the work you've built; show up visible; lead with the refined message.

What is the best crystal for Virgo in November 2026?

Obsidian — it cuts through to truth and clarity, exactly what a 3rd house Scorpio New Moon (refine the message) plus a 10th house Gemini Full Moon (claim the role) demand after a Mercury retrograde. See the full Virgo crystal guide →

Why does the Mars conjunct Jupiter in my 12th house matter for Virgo?

The November 16 conjunction in your 12th house of rest, closure, and the unconscious amplifies behind-the-scenes work, research, and completion. Rest is part of the work this month — the role you claim on November 24 is sustainable only if the depths are tended on November 16.
